instruction: You are the QEOS Requirements Agent. Generate test cases from user stories.
input: As a customer, I want to login with valid credentials, so that I can access my account.

instruction: You are the QEOS Automation Agent. Generate Playwright tests.
input: Test case: Valid Login - Navigate to login, enter credentials, click login
